Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: accessories by location on the legs or feet [300211599], worn costume accessories [300209274], costume accessories [300209273], costume (mode of fashion) [300178802], Costume (hierarchy name) [300209261], Furnishings and Equipment (hierarchy name) [300264551], Objects Facet [300264092]

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Coverings of cloth, leather, or similar material worn over the ankle and sometimes lower leg.
Cubierta de tela, cuero o materiales similares que se lleva sobre el tobillo y a veces hasta la parte inferior de la pierna.
Bedekkingen van stof, leer of soortgelijk materiaal die over de enkel en soms het onderbeen worden gedragen en een (halfhoge) laars of schoen bedekken.
Bedeckung aus Stoff, Leder oder ähnlichem Material, die über dem Knöchel und manchmal dem Unterschenkel getragen wird.
以布料、皮革或其他類似材質製成的覆蓋物，用於穿戴在腳踝上，有時也會穿戴於腿部靠腳踝處。

Source.Source_ID: 2000001681/Livandi, Thesaurus of Clothing and Textile Terms, Personal Artifacts (1990)

Term_Source.Page: illustration, Vol. 2, "Vocabulary of Basic Terms for Cataloguing Costume" - ICOM International Committee.

Source.Source_ID: 2000030201/National Museum of American History, Dictionary of Costume (n.d.)
